parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ receipt_id: 'n8n-provider-health-' + Date.now() + '-' + Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8), suite_id: ($env.DEFAULT_SUITE_ID || 'ffffffff-0000-0000-0000-system000000'), tenant_id: 'system', office_id: ($env.DEFAULT_OFFICE_ID || $env.DEFAULT_SUITE_ID || 'ffffffff-0000-0000-0000-system000000'), receipt_type: 'n8n_ops', status: 'SUCCEEDED', correlation_id: $('Kill Switch + Prep').first().json.correlationId, actor_type: 'SYSTEM', actor_id: 'n8n-provider-health', action: { action_type: 'ops.provider_health_check', risk_tier: ($json.overallStatus === 'passed' ? 'green' : 'yellow'), providers: $json.providers || [], robot_status: $json.overallStatus || 'partial', source: $json.source || 'provider_call_log', queried_rows: $json.queriedRows || 0 }, created_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ receipt_id: 'n8n-provider-health-killed-' + Date.now() + '-' + Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8), suite_id: ($env.DEFAULT_SUITE_ID || 'ffffffff-0000-0000-0000-system000000'), tenant_id: 'system', office_id: ($env.DEFAULT_OFFICE_ID || $env.DEFAULT_SUITE_ID || 'ffffffff-0000-0000-0000-system000000'), receipt_type: 'n8n_ops', status: 'SKIPPED', correlation_id: 'n8n-provider-health-killed-' + new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 16), actor_type: 'SYSTEM', actor_id: 'n8n-provider-health', action: { action_type: 'ops.provider_health_check', reason: 'kill_switch_disabled' }, created_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ receipt_id: 'n8n-provider-health-fail-' + Date.now() + '-' + Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8), suite_id: ($env.DEFAULT_SUITE_ID || 'ffffffff-0000-0000-0000-system000000'), tenant_id: 'system', office_id: ($env.DEFAULT_OFFICE_ID || $env.DEFAULT_SUITE_ID || 'ffffffff-0000-0000-0000-system000000'), receipt_type: 'n8n_ops', status: 'FAILED', correlation_id: 'n8n-provider-health', actor_type: 'SYSTEM', actor_id: 'n8n-provider-health', action: { action_type: 'ops.provider_health_check' }, result: { error_message: $json.message || 'Health check failed' }, created_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}
